mission.title: kserve: feat: add CatBoost model format supported by MLServer runtime
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:

Adds support of `CatBoost` model format for `MlServer` runtime

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:

**Type of changes**

**Feature/Issue validation/testing**:

Created `isvc` resource with provided model format and fake `storageUri`, just to verify that controller picked appropriate `ClusterServingRuntime`:

```sh
kubectl create namespace kitty

kubectl -n kitty apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1"
kind: "InferenceService"
metadata:
  n

steps.title: Please confirm that if this PR changes any image versions, then that's the so...
steps.description: Please confirm that if this PR changes any image versions, then that's the sole change this PR makes.

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
kubectl create namespace kitty

kubectl -n kitty apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1"
kind: "InferenceService"
metadata:
  name: catboost-example
spec:
  predictor:
    model:
      modelFormat:
        name: catboost
      protocolVersion: v2
      storageUri: "gs://kfserving-examples/models/sklearn/1.0/model"
EOF
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/kserve/kserve/pull/4675. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.
